summary.key_theme: 公司憑藉 AI 資料中心連接技術的領先地位，以及納入羅素指數帶來的資金流動性，推動股價持續強勢表現。

bullish.title: How Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd’s (CRDO) DustPhotonics Deal Deepens Its AI Data Center Connectivity Roadmap
bullish.reason: 透過收購 DustPhotonics，Credo 進一步強化了在 AI 資料中心高速連接領域的技術護城河，有助於擴大其在 AI 基礎設施市場的市占率。

bullish.title: How Credo’s Shift Into Larger Russell Indices and AI Connectivity Focus Will Impact CRDO Investors
bullish.reason: 納入羅素指數（Russell Indices）將吸引更多被動式基金配置，顯著提升股票流動性與市場能見度，對長期股價支撐有正面效益。

bullish.title: Credo Technology Group (CRDO) Up 18.8% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
bullish.reason: 財報發布後股價強勁上漲 18.8 %，反映市場對其營收成長與獲利能力的認可，動能指標顯示買盤強勁。

bullish.title: Why Is Credo Stock Surging On Tuesday? — Credo Technology Group (NASDAQ: CRDO) stock surges on Tuesday amid a broader technology sector rally and recent analyst
bullish.reason: 受惠於整體科技類股的漲勢以及分析師的正面評價，顯示市場情緒對 Credo 的成長前景持樂觀態度。
